2606.27234.title: From Celebrities to Anyone: Characterizing AI Nudification Content, Technology, and Community Dynamics on 4chan
2606.27234.paper_summary: AI nudification uses generative models to create synthetic non-consensual sexually explicit imagery (SNEACI) of real individuals. Prior work has examined dedicated nudification platforms and model repositories, finding that most targets are female celebrities. However, the anonymous content community, where SNEACI is actively requested, generated, and exchanged, remains unexplored. In this work, we present a large-scale study of AI nudification in the wild, identifying 24,105 SNEACI items. We find a significant shift in target demographics: non-celebrity individuals now account for 55.8\% of targets, compared to only 4.7\% in prior studies, indicating that AI nudification has expanded from targeting public figures to increasingly harming individuals within users' own social circles. Meanwhile, open-source models dominate production, with Stable Diffusion family generating 42.7\% of images and Wan generating 66.5\% of videos, all driven by thousands of shared fine-tuned models and accessible tutorials. Yet the ecosystem runs on a small cohort of active producers, with the most prolific producing 780 items, drives community engagement, shapes target demographics, and disseminates technical knowledge that lowers barriers for new producers. Our work provides an empirical understanding of how AI nudification operates in the wild, revealing the mechanisms that sustain this ecosystem and highlighting the urgent need for interventions in platform governance, technical safeguards, and affected individual protection.
2606.27234.paper_summary_zh: AI 裸露化使用生成模型創建真實個體的合成非自願性露骨影像 (SNEACI)。先前的研究考察了專門的裸露化平台和模型庫，發現大多數目標是女性名人。然而，匿名內容社區——SNEACI 在此社區中被積極請求、生成和交換——仍然未被探索。在這項工作中，我們呈現了一項關於 AI 裸露化的廣泛研究，識別出 24,105 件 SNEACI 物品。我們發現目標人口統計出現顯著變化：非名人個體現在佔目標的 55.8\%，而先前研究僅為 4.7\%，這表明 AI 裸露化已經從針對公眾人物擴展到越來越多地傷害用戶自身社交圈內的個體。同時，開源模型主導了生產，Stable Diffusion 系列生成了 42.7\% 的影像，而 Wan 則生成了 66.5\% 的視頻，這一切都是由數千個共享的微調模型和可訪問的教程驅動的。然而，生態系統依賴於一小部分活躍的生產者，其中最具生產力的生產了 780 件物品，推動了社區參與，塑造了目標人口統計，並傳播降低新生產者門檻的技術知識。我們的工作提供了對 AI 裸露化在實際運作中如何運行的實證理解，揭示了支撐這一生態系統的機制，並突顯了在平台治理、技術保障和受影響個體保護方面進行干預的迫切需求。
2606.27234.author: Chi Cui et.al.
2606.27234.authors: Chi Cui, Yixin Wu, Yang Zhang
